name: copilot-cli-test
description: Demo the standalone GitHub Copilot CLI binary — version check then one-shot prompt via -p flag. The copilot binary lives at ~/.local/share/gh/copilot/copilot (auto-downloaded by gh copilot on first run). WSL PATH is stripped of Windows paths and ~/.local/share/gh/copilot is prepended so the native Linux binary is used. Requires GH_TOKEN or gh auth login in WSL beforehand.

commands: command -v copilot || { echo 'ERROR: copilot binary not found. Run gh copilot once to download it.'; exit 1; }
